overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a sunlit historic city with sandstone buildings, palm trees, and cobblestone streets. The character moves from a dirt residential area through wooden walkways and grand plazas toward a ceremonial district with obelisks.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential dirt street with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a residential district with dirt roads and simple market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the dirt path

entered.detail: unpaved dirt road with tire tracks and scattered debris
mud brick structure with red canvas awning providing shade
tall palm tree casting shadows across the street
traditional earthen building with small windows
tall stone obelisk visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path in a residential area of the ancient city. Simple mud brick buildings with red awnings line the right side, while palm trees provide sparse shade. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance, and a tall obelisk is visible far down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway between residential buildings

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to wooden plank walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated wooden walkway between stone buildings

entered.detail: elevated walkway made of weathered wooden planks
distinctive flat-topped pine tree providing shade
two-story stone house with small windows

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto an elevated wooden walkway that cuts between residential structures. The path is shaded by umbrella pine trees, and stone buildings flank both sides. The dirt road and market stalls of the previous area fall behind as the character approaches the grander district ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with grand stone mansions and balconies

events.description: transition from wooden walkway to cobblestone street with ornate architecture
character turns slightly right to navigate around the corner of a large building

agents.ego_description: walking through the historic district admiring the multi-story stone mansions with wooden balconies

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in robes walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: well-worn cobblestone pavement with irregular stone patterns
grand three-story building with ornate wooden balconies and red columns
stone walls covered in green climbing vines

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a proper cobblestone street lined with grand stone mansions featuring wooden balconies and red columns. Ivy covers the walls of the buildings on the left. The character turns slightly to navigate around the corner of a large structure, while the obelisk in the distance grows larger.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with ceremonial pavilion and formal gardens

events.description: entering open plaza with white draped pavilion and decorative columns
character turns left to walk around the pavilion structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza, observing the white draped pavilion and garden areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking across the plaza

entered.detail: ceremonial structure with white fabric draped between decorated columns
classical stone statue near the pavilion entrance
tall narrow evergreen tree
trimmed green hedges bordering the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open plaza featuring an impressive white-draped pavilion supported by decorated columns. A stone statue stands near the pavilion, and manicured garden hedges line the right side. The character turns left to navigate around the pavilion, revealing more of the open square and distant obelisks.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial temple approach with obelisks and burning braziers

events.description: approaching ceremonial area with stone pavement and burning brazier
passing by large burning ceremonial fire pit on the left

agents.ego_description: walking toward the temple complex, passing ceremonial fires and approaching the obelisks

entered.detail: stone fire pit with flames burning brightly
large cut stone slabs forming the temple approach
grand temple structure with white marble columns
red flowering plants in a raised bed
decorative carved stone fence

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a ceremonial temple complex, walking on large stone pavement slabs. A burning brazier with bright flames sits to the left, surrounded by flower beds and stone railings. Tall palm trees line the approach, and massive obelisks stand in the distance near the white marble temple entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian city that evolves from a humble residential district into a grand ceremonial area. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with simple mud-brick buildings and red awnings, with a distant obelisk marking the horizon. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts onto an elevated wooden walkway shaded by umbrella pine trees, leaving the dirt roads and market stalls behind. The scene then opens onto a polished cobblestone street flanked by imposing stone mansions with red columns and ivy-covered walls. Finally, the camera navigates around the corner of a large structure as the distant obelisk looms larger and more prominent against the skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, manicured plaza into the heart of a grand ceremonial temple complex. It begins as the character enters an open square featuring a white-draped pavilion with decorated columns and a nearby stone statue, flanked by neatly trimmed garden hedges. As the character turns left to navigate around the pavilion, the view expands to reveal the scale of the square and the distant silhouette of towering obelisks. The scene then shifts toward the temple approach, where the terrain transitions to large stone pavement slabs lined with tall palm trees. Finally, the camera passes a burning brazier and vibrant flower beds before arriving at the massive obelisks and the white marble entrance of the temple.
